┌───────────────────── PAYP — BUY — 126 shares @ $19.12 ──────────────────────┐
│   Step 1: Place a Buy Limit Order for 126 shares of PAYP at $18.74          │
│   Step 2: Order only fills if price dips to $18.74 or lower                 │
│   Step 3: Once filled, immediately set a Sell Stop Loss at $16.69           │
│   Step 4: Set a Sell Limit (take profit) at $26.41                          │
│   Step 5: If price never dips to $18.74, you can adjust the limit higher or │
│ wait                                                                        │
│                                                                             │
│   Why Limit Order: Near support at $18.82 (1.6% away) — Limit Order catches │
│ a dip for a better entry price                                              │
